benefits.description: Resolved early waking and sleep fragmentation caused by Retatrutide; now sleeping 8 hours straight through to 7:30am with no nocturnal awakenings

side_effects.description: Light night sweating and stimulating effect when dosed at 7pm; too awake at 11pm and early waking/fragmented sleep returned when dose increased to 200mcg or dosed at 6:30pm

protocol_notes: 49F. Epitalon at 100mcg dosed at 5pm (no later). Combined with low-dose melatonin 0.3–1mg and L-Theanine 200mg. Higher doses (200mcg) or later timing (6:30–7pm) caused insomnia and sleep fragmentation. Plan: 5 days on / 2 days off for 2–3 months, then 1 month break, then repeat. Also taking melatonin 0.5–1mg and L-Theanine 200mg as part of stack. Previously tried melatonin + magnesium glycinate (did not work), then low-dose melatonin + L-Theanine (1 hour improvement in 5 days).
